name: Sphinx Trading Co. Inc
description_short: Sphinx Trading Co. operates multiple New Jersey locations offering check cashing at 2% fees, money wire services via MoneyGram and Western Union, and bill payment options.
description_long:
Sphinx Trading Co. Inc. is a check-cashing and money services business with a physical presence across New Jersey, operating three confirmed locations in Jersey City and Union City. The company has been established as a community financial services provider focused on customers who need alternatives to traditional banking for check cashing and money transfer needs. Their service model centers on convenience and accessibility through multiple brick-and-mortar locations with extended operating hours throughout the week.

The company offers check cashing with a straightforward 2% fee structure, money wire transfers through two major networks (MoneyGram and Western Union) without stated amount restrictions, and bill payment services for utilities, telephone, credit cards, and other common household expenses. All three locations provide the same core service suite, allowing customers flexibility in where they access services across the Jersey City and Union City area. The business operates with extended weekday and weekend hours, with some locations open as early as 7am and as late as 9pm to accommodate working customers.

Sphinx Trading distinguishes itself through its transparent 2% flat fee for check cashing—lower than many competitors in the industry—and its integration of multiple money transfer networks rather than exclusive partnerships. The multi-location approach with consistent service across all branches provides redundancy for customers, and the extended business hours, particularly Union City's 7am opening on weekdays, cater to shift workers and early risers. The company maintains direct customer contact through a functional website and actively solicits feedback through their contact form.

As a check-cashing business, Sphinx Trading serves an essential but limited financial services niche. The company appears professionally operated with clear service descriptions and multiple convenient locations, though the website provides minimal information about verification requirements, identification policies, or specific limitations on check amounts. Like all check-cashing services, this company represents an alternative to traditional banking rather than a wealth-building tool, and customers should understand that check-cashing fees, while competitive at 2%, represent cumulative costs over time compared to free checking accounts.
address: 2828 John F. Kennedy Blvd, Jersey City, NJ 07306

company_info.headquarters: 2828 John F. Kennedy Blvd, Jersey City, NJ 07306

pros: Competitive 2% flat fee for check cashing—transparent and lower than many competitors
Multiple locations across New Jersey (Kennedy Blvd, Central Avenue, Union City) providing convenient access
Extended business hours including Union City location open 7am-9pm weekdays for working customers
Integration of both MoneyGram and Western Union for money transfers without stated amount caps
Bill payment services for utilities, telephone, and credit cards at all locations
Saturday and Sunday availability at all three locations for weekend transactions
Professional website with clear service descriptions and active customer feedback system
cons: Website provides no information about check amount limits, verification requirements, or identification policies
Only three physical locations limits accessibility for New Jersey residents outside Jersey City/Union City areas
No online check cashing or digital service options—entirely location-dependent
2% check cashing fee, while competitive, still represents ongoing cost not present with free checking accounts
Limited transparency on money wire fee structures for MoneyGram and Western Union transfers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked workers in Jersey City and Union City needing regular check cashing
Customers who need extended-hours check cashing, particularly Union City's 7am weekday opening
Individuals without access to traditional banks seeking reliable bill payment services
People needing periodic money wire transfers through established networks like MoneyGram or Western Union
diagnosis: Sphinx Trading is best for unbanked or underbanked New Jersey residents in the Jersey City and Union City areas who need reliable check cashing with competitive 2% fees and bill payment services. The main caveat is that this is a specialized financial services provider for transaction processing—not appropriate for customers seeking credit building, loans, or comprehensive banking services, and its accessibility is limited to specific geographic areas.
services: In-store customer service at Kennedy Boulevard main office
In-store customer service at Central Avenue location
In-store customer service at Union City location
Customer feedback and support through contact form
meta_description: Sphinx Trading Co. offers check cashing at 2% fees, money wire services via MoneyGram and Western Union, and bill payments in New Jersey.
